outlook.summary: Spot at 6741.5 sits between 0DTE Max Pain (6720) and Weekly Max Pain (6805), creating a magnetic pull zone. Heavy Put OI at 6450-6600 forms a structural floor. The 7000 strike is a dominant RESONANCE level across all expiries (283K+ Monthly OI), capping upside. Bearish skew (1.25-1.49) and PCR > 1.4 confirms defensive positioning. Dealers are long gamma on 0DTE (18.68B) but short on weekly/monthly (-3.8B combined), suggesting stability near spot with volatility expansion on breaks.
